stages.editorComingSoon: Coming soon, follow us for updates

smartImport.title: Start Your Creative Journey
smartImport.subtitle: First, choose your creation method

manualCreate.title: Create from Episode 1
manualCreate.description: Start from episode 1, suitable for episodic creation or single short videos

smartImport.title: Smart Import Full Book
smartImport.description: Upload a complete novel or script, AI engine automatically recognizes chapter structure and splits into episodes.

upload.title: Upload Raw Material
upload.subtitle: AI engine is ready, automatic episode splitting and formatting
upload.placeholder: Paste your novel chapters or script content here...

analyzing.title: AI is Analyzing Your Story
analyzing.description: Recognizing chapter structure, smart splitting in progress...

deleteConfirm.title: Confirm Delete
deleteConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to delete "{title}"?

tip.title: Tip
tip.content: You can directly edit titles, summaries, and content. After clicking [Confirm Complete], episodes will be officially imported into the project

errors.fileTooLarge: File too large, please upload a file smaller than 10MB
errors.docNotSupported: .doc format not supported, please convert to .docx in Word
errors.fileReadError: File read failed, please try again
errors.uploadFirst: Please upload or paste content first

smartImport.cancelConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel? Analyzed episodes will be cleared.

storyInput.editingTip: The following workflow is for this episode only. Switch episodes in the top left if needed

assetLibraryTip.title: Need custom characters and locations?
assetLibraryTip.description: Click the 「Asset Library」 button in the top right to upload asset setting documents or manually add characters/locations. AI will prioritize using settings from the asset library for analysis.

storyInput.videoRatioHint: Pick a ratio that matches your target platform and content format

ratioUsage.1_1: 1:1: Square frame, good for avatars, covers and generic social posts
ratioUsage.9_16: 9:16: Vertical video, ideal for TikTok, Reels, Shorts and other short‑video feeds
ratioUsage.16_9: 16:9: Horizontal video, ideal for YouTube, Bilibili and desktop playback
ratioUsage.4_3: 4:3: Classic TV ratio, useful for legacy footage or safe cropping
ratioUsage.3_4: 3:4: Slightly vertical, suitable for mixed text + video layouts
ratioUsage.2_3: 2:3: More vertical, good for posters and character key art
ratioUsage.3_2: 3:2: Slightly horizontal, good for landscapes and story scenes
ratioUsage.4_5: 4:5: Vertical poster ratio, common in social feed images
ratioUsage.5_4: 5:4: Horizontal poster ratio, suitable for PC web banners
ratioUsage.21_9: 21:9: Ultra‑wide cinematic frame, ideal for movie‑like shots and panoramas

storyInput.visualStyleHint: Choose an art style that fits your project — e.g. Realistic for live-action, Anime for 2D content
storyInput.currentConfigSummary: Current config: {ratio} · {style}. All subsequent generations will use this combo.
storyInput.assetLibraryRatioNote: Asset library ratios are not affected
storyInput.moreConfig: For more configuration options, click the 「 Settings」 button in the top right

narration.title: Enable Narration Voiceover
narration.description: Generate TTS voice narration to add commentary to your video

storyInput.ready: ✓ Configuration complete, ready for next step

longTextDetection.title: 🚀 Smart Episode Splitting Recommended
longTextDetection.description: Detected ~{count} characters. Processing long text as a single episode may reduce output quality.
longTextDetection.strongRecommend: We strongly recommend using Smart Split. AI will automatically identify chapters, split into episodes, and process them in parallel for significantly better results.
longTextDetection.singleEpisodeWarning: All content will be processed as one episode

execution.requestAborted: Request aborted (possibly due to page refresh)
execution.taskStreamTimeout: Task timed out. The task may still be running in the background — please check its status or retry

storyToScript.title: Script Flow Will Be Rebuilt
storyToScript.message: Downstream storyboard data is detected for this episode ({storyboardCount} storyboards, {panelCount} panels). Continuing will clear and rebuild this data. Continue?

scriptToStoryboard.title: Storyboard Data Will Be Rebuilt
scriptToStoryboard.message: Existing storyboard data is detected for this episode ({storyboardCount} storyboards, {panelCount} panels). Continuing will clear current storyboards and regenerate them. Continue?

editor.title: AI Editor
editor.subtitle: Canvas {width}×{height} · autosave enabled
editor.emptyDescription: Generate at least one storyboard video in the video stage, then return to AI Editor.

assets.title: Assets
assets.description: Click an asset to append it to the timeline

empty.image: Image assets will be connected in Phase 2
empty.bgm: BGM assets will be connected in Phase 2

assets.imageHint: The editor currently uses generated videos as primary assets; standalone image assets will be added with later AI editing tools.

roughCut.title: Smart rough cut
roughCut.description: Rebuild the rough-cut timeline by stitching generated panel videos and voice lines in storyboard order.

smartCut.done: Smart rough cut complete. Timeline refreshed.
smartCut.failed: Smart rough cut failed. Please try again.
smartCut.saveConflict: The editor project has a save conflict. Resolve it before running smart rough cut.
smartCut.unsavedChanges: Current editor changes have not been saved. Save successfully before running smart rough cut.
smartCut.missingContext: Missing current episode or editor project.
smartCut.noVideos: Generate at least one storyboard video first.

captions.title: Auto captions
captions.description: Use existing voice-line text to create a timed caption track.

caption.failed: Caption generation failed. Please try again.
caption.saveConflict: The editor project has a save conflict. Resolve it before generating captions.
caption.unsavedChanges: Current editor changes have not been saved. Save successfully before generating captions.
caption.missingContext: Missing current episode or editor project.
caption.noVoiceLines: Generate or add voice-line text first.

voiceOptimize.title: Voice optimize
voiceOptimize.description: Select a voice clip, edit the script, switch speaker voice, or adjust speed, then regenerate audio.
voiceOptimize.failed: Voice optimization failed. Please try again.
voiceOptimize.saveConflict: The editor project has a save conflict. Resolve it before optimizing voice.
voiceOptimize.unsavedChanges: Current editor changes have not been saved. Save successfully before optimizing voice.
voiceOptimize.missingContext: Missing current episode, editor project, or selected voice clip.
voiceOptimize.selectAudio: Select a voice clip on the timeline first.
voiceOptimize.noVoiceLine: Could not find the corresponding voice line.
voiceOptimize.audioElementNotFound: Could not find the selected voice clip in the timeline.
voiceOptimize.durationOverlap: The new voice duration would overlap the next voice clip on the same track. Shorten the script or adjust the timeline, then retry.
voiceOptimize.textLabel: Voice script (MVP: edit directly, then regenerate)

polish.title: Visual polish
polish.description: Add transitions, motion, and pacing refinements automatically.

ai.phase2Hint: AI editing tools will be connected in Phase 2.

enhance.title: AI enhance
enhance.description: Select a video clip, then apply smart crop. Restore/upscale needs a video enhancement provider and is currently a placeholder.
enhance.saveConflict: The editor project has a save conflict. Resolve it before enhancing video.
enhance.unsavedChanges: Current editor changes have not been saved. Save successfully before enhancing video.
enhance.missingContext: Missing current episode, editor project, or selected video clip.
enhance.selectVideo: Select a video clip on the timeline first.
enhance.videoElementNotFound: Could not find the selected video clip in the timeline.
enhance.restoreUnavailable: Restore/upscale is not available yet because no video enhancement provider is configured.
enhance.mvpNote: MVP: smart crop updates Twick objectFit/frame parameters only, so it does not create a new MediaObject or EditorAsset.

transition.title: Smart transition
transition.description: Select a video/image clip, then get free rule-based recommendations for the transition to the next clip.
transition.failed: Transition recommendation failed. Please try again.
transition.saveConflict: The editor project has a save conflict. Resolve it before recommending transitions.
transition.unsavedChanges: Current editor changes have not been saved. Save successfully before recommending transitions.
transition.missingContext: Missing current episode, editor project, or selected adjacent clips.
transition.selectClip: Select a video or image clip on the timeline first.
transition.noNextClip: Select a clip that has a following video/image clip on the same track.
transition.elementNotFound: Could not find the selected adjacent clips in the saved timeline.
transition.applyFailed: Could not apply transition to the timeline.
transition.freeNote: Free: rule-based local analysis only, no provider call and no billing freeze.
transition.renderSupportNote: Saved to the Twick timeline. Visual transition rendering in preview/export depends on renderer support in the installed Twick version.

captionStyle.title: Caption style
captionStyle.mvpHint: MVP uses the default caption style (white text, black stroke, centered). Style editing will be connected later.

properties.phase2Hint: Clip property editing will be completed in Phase 2.
